posts.title: August 26th~ Networking Mixer Hosted By: Belmont Village Senior Living Calabasas
posts.body:
Networking Mixer Hosted By:

Belmont Village Senior Living Calabasas

Accurate head counts are imperative as our venues are running a tight margin as a sponsor.

The amount of food they provide and the labor used is determined by our headcount.

Members Free-Must RSVP Click Here

Guests $15 Click Here

Thank you to our host!

Belmont Village Senior Living Calabasas

Belmont Village of Calabasas, a vibrant and beautiful senior living community, came to life just a few years ago, with stimulating activities, invigorating exercise programs, delicious cuisine and a warm social setting

perfect for making new friends.

The three-story community is nestled in the heart of Calabasas, surrounded by premier dining, shopping and entertainment. Here, you'll find innovative and comprehensive programs for health and wellness at all levels of need, including two award-winning memory care programs, a professionally managed fitness center with

on-site physical therapy services and heated, salt-water pool, as well as licensed nurses and well-trained staff on-site, 24/7. In addition, Belmont Village, Calabasas features a signature blend of hospitality and amenities, including chef-prepared, restaurant-style dining and complimentary transportation. Tours are offered seven days a week, please call to schedule an appointment: 818.222.2600.

24141 Ventura Blvd.

Calabasas, CA 91302

Phone: (818) 378-9130

Web: belmontvillage.com/calabasas
Pricing & Availability:  (800) 755-1458

posts.body:
Thank you to our sponsor:

West Valley~Warner Center Chamber of Commerce Breakfast~

Not Your Typical Boring Meeting!

Wednesday, November 4th at 7 AM

Location: Woodland Hills Country Club

21150 Dumetz Rd.

Woodland Hills CA 91364

Please park in the lower lot which is the first parking lot after entering the property.

Head count is very important to the venue,

so please RSVP by Noon on Friday, October 30th!

Accurate head counts are imperative as our venues are running a tight margin.

The amount of food they provide and the labor used is determined by our headcount

Prepaid Members  $35, One-time Prepaid Trial Guests $45

Click Here To Sign Up

Register now to avoid a $15 Walk-In Fee!

There will be assigned seating.

THE DRAIN CO   -Star Tomlinson

THE DRAIN CO. family has been providing Preventative and Emergency Drain Service for Residential, Commercial and Multi-unit Properties in the Greater Los Angeles Area Since 1969.

greatest resource and success."  ~ Star Tomlinson

posts.title: September 2nd ~Start Your Month With a Motivating and Fun Breakfast at the Woodland Hills Country Club
posts.body:
Thank you to our Sponsor:

Tim Gaspar

West Valley~Warner Center Chamber of Commerce Breakfast~

Not Your Typical Boring Meeting!

Wednesday, September 2nd at 7 AM

Location: Woodland Hills Country Club

21150 Dumetz Rd.

Woodland Hills, CA 91364

Please park in the lower lot, which is the first parking lot after entering the property.

Head count is very important to the venue,

RSVP by Noon on Friday, July 31st!

Accurate headcounts are imperative, as our venues operate on a tight margin.

The amount of food they provide and the labor used is determined by our headcount

Prepaid Members  $35, One-time Prepaid Trial Guests $45

Click Here To Sign Up

Walk-ins welcome: Members $50 and Guests $60

Register now to avoid a $15 Walk-In Fee!

There will be assigned seating.

Thank You To Our Sponsor:

Meet Tim: A Champion for Community, Resilience, and Purpose

Tim Gaspar is more than a successful entrepreneur — he's a proud son of the West Valley whose life has been shaped by the very community he now works tirelessly to support. Born and raised in Canoga Park, Tim is a product of local public schools and a proud graduate of El Camino Real High School, Pierce College, and California State University, Northridge. His deep local roots have instilled in him a profound sense of duty to give back and uplift the place he calls home.

Sponsored By:

Thank you to our sponsor:

UCLA Health~Robbie Gluckson

UCLA Health is among the most comprehensive and advanced health care systems

in the world. We strive to provide the best patient experience with every patient,

every encounter, every time.

Our mission is to provide state-of-the-art patient care, generate research discoveries leading to new treatments and diagnoses, and train future generations of health care professionals.

We offer an integrated network of Primary & Specialty Care services at more than 280 clinics across Southern California and the central coast and at five medical centers including the

UCLA West Valley Medical Center.

Location: El Caballero Country Club

18300 Tarzana Dr., Tarzana CA 91356

Directions and Instructions:

For GBS, use the  address 18300 Tarzana Dr. rather than the club name.

The gated entrance of the club will have a guard in attendance.

There is signage at the entrance that distinguishes the club.

*Guard at gate might ask for your ID. Be sure to bring it to the event.

Head count is very important to the venue,

so please RSVP by Noon on Friday, February 27!

Accurate head counts are imperative as our venues are running a tight margin.

The amount of food they provide and the labor used is determined by our headcount

Prepaid Members  $35, One-time Prepaid Trial Guests $45

If you are not pre-registered, your name will not be at the guard gate

and they will not allow you entrance to the club.

There will be assigned seating.

 Sponsored By:

JM Eagle LA Championship

The JM Eagle LA Championship presented by Plastpro is the LPGA Tour's signature event in Los Angeles, taking place April 13-19 2026, at El Caballero Country Club in Tarzana. The 2026 LPGA Tournament event of the year, the JM Eagle LA Championship will feature the world's greatest female professional golfers competing for a share of the $3.75 million purse, one of the largest tournament purses on the LPGA Tour. The JM Eagle LA Championship is owned and operated by Outlyr, a global event management, sponsorship consulting and activation agency that specializes in the development and execution of engaging events and experiences. For more information on the JM Eagle LA Championship presented by Plastpro, visit www.jmeaglelachampionship.com.

posts.title: January 7th 2026 at 7 AM ~Start Your Month With a Motivating and Fun Breakfast at Fogo De Chao Woodland Hills
posts.body:
Thank you to our sponsor:

West Valley~Warner Center Chamber of Commerce Breakfast~

Not Your Typical Boring Meeting!

Wednesday, January 7th 7 AM.

Location: Fogo De Chao Woodland Hills

6263 Topanga Canyon Boulevard

Woodland Hills, CA 91367

Valet parking will be available at $5.00 per vehicle.

Head count is very important to the venue,

so please RSVP by Noon on Tuesday, January 6th!

Prepaid Members  $35, One-time Prepaid Trial Guests $45

Walk-ins welcome: Members $50 and Guests $60

Register now to avoid a $15 Walk-In Fee!

Accurate head counts are imperative as our venues are running a tight margin.

The amount of food they provide and the labor used is determined by our headcount!

There will be assigned seating.

Sponsored By:

Elevated Healing Behavioral Health, Inc

Elevated Healing Treatment Centers in Woodland Hills provides compassionate, physician-led care for adults facing mental health, addiction, or eating disorder challenges. Offering Medicare, Aetna, and Blue Shield coverage, we combine evidence-based treatment with wellness programs like yoga, art, and sound therapy to support healing and resilience across our community.

***We have held off as long as we could to keep the breakfast price at $32. (It costs us $31.80 and we charge $32 to break even. Due to the rising costs of food and labor our member venues/restaurants are experiencing, we will be increasing the cost just a few dollars for the 2026 breakfasts. We recommend the prepay option so that you do not have to pay each month.   ($420 annual, good time to consider entry level Leader Level breakfast and membership is almost $1,000 which is just $500 off from getting your logo everywhere.  Add an exhibit space and you are there)

Here are the results for the chamber of commerce to break even in 2026:

Members  $35 (register before noon the day before)

One-time Trial Guests $45.

At Door: Members $50 and Guests $60

For those of you that pre-pay for all the breakfasts for 2026, the cost will be $420. Here is the link to pre-pay: https://www.woodlandhillscc.net/pay_for_item.php?do=payonline

posts.title: September 7th 2025 ~10th Annual PAWS 4 Kisses  & Hugs Honoring LAFD Fire fighters in Memory of 9/11
posts.body:
The 10th Annual PAWS 4 Kisses & Hugs: Honoring LAFD Firefighters in Memory of 9/11. We proudly honor our local heroes from Fire Station 107, Station 08,

Station 75 and Station 28, celebrating not just their bravery but also the bond they share with the community. PAWS 4 Kisses & Hugs marks a significant milestone this year, celebrating a decade of connection, compassion, and community support. The PAWS Team would like to give a special Thank You to Diana Williams, CEO of the West Valley Warner Center Chamber of Commerce, for providing the PAWS Swag Bags for this event.

Event Details:

Date: Sunday, September 7, 2025

Location: Chatsworth Metro Station - Check in

Time: 8:30 AM

For more information, please contact:

Mercy J. Alpert

Paws Community Liaison

(818) 388-6961

havemercyone@gmail.cm

posts.title: November 9, 2025 Grateful Hearts Donate Now!
posts.body:
FREE Parking-Enter Owensmouth.  Enter event through pedestrian gate walk way on east side of property.

West Valley-Warner Center Chamber of Commerce Community Benefit Foundation and the local business community present the:

16th Annual Grateful Hearts – a fundraiser for our local first responders. Funds generated from this community event help provide essential items for firefighters and officers which are not covered by City budgets.

Sunday, November 9, 2025 9 AM-3 PM at 6100 Ownsmouth! Rams Village at Warner Center.

Parking at 6100 Owensmouth Street.

YOU may start donating now!!

Silent Auction Link will be published soon! Dodger tickets, gift cards to movies, restaurants and much more.

Great one of a kind offerings from LAPD and LAFD.

LA Rams authentic signed gear and experiences.

Much more!

What can these Hero Bucks Get you?

Heroes cook an serve up lunch!!

You can exchange your Hero Buck for a Raffle Ticket

Donate here!

We invite you to get to know and bond with your local community and first responders. Come network, mix, mingle and enjoy fabulous food and drink from local West Valley restaurants, including tasty BBQ and Grill prepared foods by our local police and fire departments.

Grateful Hearts will be held in the heart of Future site of Rams Village on Sunday November 9 from 9 AM- 3 PM. Offering the extended community, you, your families, your colleagues and employees to participate in the supporting our local Heroes! -LAFD Battalion 17 and LAPD Topanga and West Valley Stations-

Event Producer ~ West Valley Warner Center Chamber of Commerce

Community Benefit Foundation

Chair of the Grateful Hearts Board: Dennis P. Zine WVWC Community Benefit Foundation Board Member

There are several ways to participate in the event, which include:

 Sponsorship contribution

 On-site business promotional space

 Purchase advance food and drink tickets

 Encourage your employees to attend and purchase food and drink tickets

 Provide in-kind items for auction and opportunity drawings

 This exciting event will include:

 Fine foods and drink from many local restaurants

 Car  Show

 Tasty BBQ treats prepared on site by our local LAFD.

 LAPD Cooking on the Grill!

 Photo Opportunities

 Music-Great Bands

 Live auction and opportunity drawings

We look forward to your participation in Grateful Hearts – Supporting our heroes by raising funds for our local first responders. Net proceeds will directly benefit the seven West Valley Fire Stations in Battalion #17 -- Stations 72, 73, 84, 93,104,105 and 106 and LAPD's Topanga and West Valley Stations.

See you there!

Special Thanks to our Grateful Hearts Board of Directors!

Call 818-347-4737 or visit www.woodlandhillscc.net

PO BOX 1,  Woodland Hills, CA  91365-0001

501 c3 45-0975689
